title: How Hamnet's Stars Celebrated Their Golden Globes Wins
text: Jessie Buckley and director Chloe Zhao marked their film's major victories at the 2026 Golden Globes with an enthusiastic dance party. Buckley won Best Female Actor in a Motion Picture Drama, while Hamnet took home Best Picture Drama. Both women wore matching baby blue silk dresses to the ceremony. At an after-party, they danced and sang to a popular ABBA track, with footage showing Buckley dancing on a booth while Zhao grooved nearby wearing noise-cancelling headphones. The pair eventually sat together in the booth, pointing at each other as they continued celebrating. During her acceptance speech, Zhao shared wisdom from co-star Paul Mescal about artistic vulnerability, saying artists must allow ourselves to be seen for who we are now and embrace the parts of ourselves that we're ashamed of, that we're afraid of, that are imperfect. Zhao also honored her fellow directors in the room, expressing admiration for how they became so strong and tender at the same time while sharing themselves through their work.
